Create and automate tests in Xcode for your app’s subscription and in-app purchase transactions, and SKAdNetwork implementations.

t: Testing and validating ad impression signatures and postbacks for SKAdNetwork
a: Validate your ad impressions and test your postbacks by creating unit tests using the StoreKit Test framework.
